overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking along a riverside trail transitioning from a stone overlook through dense vegetation to a sandy beach. The clip includes a brief NPC encounter and a dog companion walking alongside, set against overcast skies with distant mountains visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone overlook path with low walls

events.description: pauses briefly as villager approaches on the path

agents.ego_description: walking along a cobblestone path and pausing briefly as a villager approaches

notable_agents.action: villager in brown clothing and straw hat walking toward Geralt

entered.detail: weathered stone pathway with moss between cracks
low stone wall running along the right side of the path
large leafy tree with spreading branches overhanging the path
river visible in the valley below
castle ruins on the distant hillside
hazy mountains in the far background

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an elevated cobblestone path with a stone wall on the right and a large tree overhead. A villager approaches from the opposite direction, and they pass each other briefly. The river and distant castle are visible in the valley below under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown riverside trail through dense vegetation

events.description: descends from stone overlook into dense riverside vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking downhill through tall grass and bushes along the riverbank

entered.detail: narrow dirt path winding through tall grass
weathered wooden fence posts along the right side
tall bushes and wildflowers lining both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: Leaving the stone overlook, Geralt descends into dense riverside vegetation. The path becomes a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall grass and wildflowers, with a wooden fence visible on the right. The river runs parallel on the right side as the castle remains visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking along the river path accompanied by a dog

notable_agents.action: dog walking alongside Geralt on the trail

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the dense riverside thicket, Geralt is joined by a dog walking alongside him. The wooden fence disappears behind as they proceed along the narrow dirt trail with the river visible through the vegetation on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach along the lake shore

events.description: emerges from dense vegetation onto open sandy beach

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy shoreline with mountains visible across the water

entered.detail: wide sandy shoreline with gentle slope to the water
grassy dune with wildflowers rising on the left side
dark heavy clouds covering the sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the vegetation, the scene opens onto a wide sandy beach with the lake stretching to the horizon. The sky is heavy with storm clouds, and distant mountains are visible across the water. Geralt continues walking along the shoreline with grassy banks on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an elevated stone overlook through dense riverside thickets and finally onto an expansive sandy beach. It begins with Geralt walking along a cobblestone path beneath a large tree, passing a villager while overlooking a distant castle in the valley below. As he leaves the overlook, the scene shifts into a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall grass and wildflowers, where the camera follows him descending into dense vegetation alongside a wooden fence. The path then tightens as a dog joins his side, with the river becoming partially obscured by the thicket before the terrain suddenly opens up. Finally, the camera emerges from the greenery onto a wide shoreline, revealing a vast lake and distant mountains under a heavy, storm-clouded sky.
